zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Peyton於1677年出生在美國維吉尼亞州格盧斯特格盧斯特時，他的父親Major Robert Peyton37歲，母親Mary Margaret Keeble40歲。他於1699年與Mary Langton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1746年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州博福特巴斯享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Peyton于1677年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州格盧斯特格盧斯特时，他的父亲Major Robert Peyton37岁，母亲Mary Margaret Keeble40岁。他于1699年与Mary Langton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1746年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州博福特巴斯享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Peyton was born in 1677, in Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, United States, his father, Major Robert Peyton, was 37 and his mother, Mary Margaret Keeble, was 40. He married Mary Langton in 1699, in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1746, in Bath, Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Peyton est né en 1677, à Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Major Robert Peyton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Keeble, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Mary Langton en 1699, à Gloucester, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1746, à Bath, Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Peyton 1677 in Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Major Robert Peyton 37 und seine Mutter Mary Margaret Keeble 40. Er hat 1699 in Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America Mary Langton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1746 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Bath, Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peyton è nato il nel 1677 nel Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Major Robert Peyton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mary Margaret Keeble, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Mary Langton nel 1699, nel Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1746, nel Bath, Beaufort, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Peytonが1677年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州グロウセスターグロウセスターで生まれた時，父Major Robert Peytonは37歳，母Mary Margaret Keebleは40歳であった。1699年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州グロウセスターでMary Langtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1746年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ビーウフォートバスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Peyton(이)가 1677년 미국 버지니아 주 그루스스터 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Major Robert Peyton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margaret Keeble(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1699년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 그루스스터에서 Mary Langton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1746년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트 바스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peyton nasceu em 1677, em Gloucester, Gloucester, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Major Robert Peyton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret Keeble, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Langton em 1699, em Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1746, em Bath, Beaufort, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Peyton родился в 1677 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестир, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Major Robert Peyton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Keeble, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Langton в 1699 г. в местности глоусестир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1746 г. в местности бат, бофорт, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Peyton nació en 1677, en Gloucester, Gloucester, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Major Robert Peyton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary Margaret Keeble, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Mary Langton en 1699, en Gloucester, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1746, en Bath, Beaufort, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años.
